assignees: BMBOMICH

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE

1. Keep the "[Legal Gap]" prefix in the title above and add a short
   summary after it (example: "[Legal Gap] No clause covers biometric
   data resale").
2. Under each ## heading below, TYPE YOUR ANSWER on the lines provided
   (or directly above the next heading).
3. Lines wrapped in HTML comment syntax are hidden instructions for
   you; they do NOT appear in the published issue. Leave them as-is or
   delete them, your choice.
4. Sections marked "(optional)" can be left empty.
════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

## Have you searched existing issues?

<!-- Check the box by replacing [ ] with [x] -->

- [ ] I searched [**open**](https://github.com/BMBOMICH/psvl/issues?q=state%3Aopen%20label%3Alegal-gap)
  and [**closed**](https://github.com/BMBOMICH/psvl/issues?q=state%3Aclosed%20label%3Alegal-gap)
  legal-gap issues and this one is not a duplicate

## PSVL version

<!-- Type the PSVL version this report is about (e.g., 1.0) -->

## Which section or clause is affected?

<!-- Type the section or clause here (e.g., Section 4.5, clause 3.2.1,
     or "no section currently covers this") -->

## What is the gap or loophole?

<!-- Type a clear description of the missing protection or exploitable
     scenario. Quote the exact wording at issue if helpful. -->

## Why it matters

<!-- Type the real-world threat, actor, or scenario that would exploit
     this gap and the harm that could result if it's not closed. -->

## Suggested fix (optional)

<!-- If you have a fix in mind (new clause text, reworded existing
     clause, etc.), type it here. -->

## Anything else (optional)

<!-- Anything else you want to add. -->
